title: True Sons
summary: An organized paramilitary faction using former military and JTF expertise, heavy firepower and territorial control in Washington.

claims.text: Ubisoft describes the True Sons as paramilitary warlords using combat expertise and overwhelming firepower to dominate enemies and expand territory.
The official faction description says they are led by a ruthless former JTF officer.
During the main campaign, the True Sons hold President Ellis and his encryption key at Capitol Hill before Division Agents retake the site.

paragraphs.text: The True Sons combine paramilitary organization with territorial ambition. Their JTF-derived expertise makes them more structured than a purely opportunistic street faction.
Their control of Capitol Hill and custody of President Ellis place them directly across the Division's effort to restore the national network and government continuity.

verification.notes: Leadership succession and later seasonal alliances require a separate versioned update.
